# @recon-fuzz/mcp-chimera

> MCP server that scaffolds Chimera fuzzing test suites for Solidity smart contracts.

## Tools (4)

- scaffold_project: Generate a full Chimera project from contract name + function signatures — returns Setup, Properties, TargetFunctions, BeforeAfter, CryticTester, and fuzzer configs
- generate_properties: Generate 8-15 curated invariant properties with Solidity skeletons for a given protocol type
- get_template: Get a complete ready-to-compile Chimera project for a standard protocol type
- explain_pattern: Get a detailed explanation of a Chimera testing pattern with code examples

## Protocol types (6)

erc20, vault, lending, amm, governance, staking

## Patterns (4)

- actors: Multi-actor testing with address management and actor switching
- ghosts: Ghost variable tracking for state assertions across transactions
- cross-contract: Testing interactions between multiple deployed contracts
- setup-layering: Composable setup inheritance for complex deployment scenarios

## Setup

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "chimera-scaffold": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["@recon-fuzz/mcp-chimera"]
    }
  }
}
```

No API key needed. The server runs entirely locally with no network calls.

## Privacy

This server runs entirely offline. No network calls, no environment variables read, no data written to disk, no telemetry. All template generation happens in-process.
